rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF YU FUNG MAK
rulings.Calendar Matter: REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Since his appointment in May 2019, the administrator has not been able to sell the estate's real property. This is the administrator's 6th status report. The administrator requests a 6-month extension (which period is counted from 10/24/2024, the filing date of this status report) to sell the real property and then close this estate, rather than petitioning for final distribution of the real property in kind to the beneficiaries, including the administrator, as tenants in common. The Court is determine whether to approve this status report and grant a continuance of administration to the end of April 2025 as prayed, or whether to take the status report off calendar and order the administrator to petition for final distribution under Probate Code section 12201(c)(2), in which event the Court may need to impose a lien on the real property to secure the attorney's fees (which must be ordered to be paid out of the estate under section 10831(d)) with or without 5% simple annual interest available under LRSF 14.56, unless the beneficiaries are willing to advance sufficient cash to the estate to create the required source of payment of the attorney's fees to avoid the lien. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF AJAY DRALL
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/11/24. Examiner unavailable. Appearance will likely be required on 12/11/24. Courtesy copies are file stamped, single-sided, hard copies. [LRSF 14.7 B. and C.] (Responsive papers should not quote issues raised by the court; they should just provide the missing or incorrect information.) A Court-appointed fiduciary is required to sign and verify his or her own pleadings, including any supplement or amendment to a petition. If notice is served electronically, consents must be filed. [CRC 2.251(b).] Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DARLEEN MIN LUM
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To (1) Enforce Marvin Contract; (2) Confirm Decedent?S Property To Christopher J. Bricker Pursuant To Marvin Contract And Probate Code Section 850; (3) Enforce Oral Contract To Make A Will; And For (4) Damages For Breach Of Contract; And (5) Constructive Trust; Demand For Evidentiary Hearing
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Procedural issue to be addressed: 1) No proposed order has been received or lodged with the court. Any party lodging a proposed order in a contested matter must file proof of service of the proposed order on all parties entitled to notice of the petition. (San Francisco Local Rule 14.7.A.4). Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DARLEEN MIN LUM
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Procedural issues to be addressed: 1) No Notice of Petition to Administer Estate (Form DE-121) has been filed (Probate Code Section 8100). 2) Chris Bricker has requested special notice in these proceedings, but notice does not appear to have been provided to his counsel as requested and as required. 3) All notices must include language about remote appearances (San Francisco Local Rule 14.1.C.6). Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.
